seo.home_description: From urban planning to software: a full-stack developer building digital products the way you'd build a city. Web & mobile with React, Vue and .NET.
seo.about_description: My story from urban planner to full-stack developer: my background, goals, and journey into software.
seo.skills_description: The front-end and back-end technologies I use in production: React, Vue, C#, .NET, SQL, and more.
seo.projects_description: From idea to release: the web and mobile apps, products, and experiments I have built.
seo.contact_description: Have a project idea or just want to say hello? Get in touch with me.

home.description: Unplanned structures don't last. I carry the discipline of urban planning into software: solid foundations, considered details, and products built to grow. Three of my apps are live on the stores today, and my enterprise systems run in production every day.
home.career_p1: I didn't take the usual route into software. I trained as an urban planner and spent nine years working in real-estate appraisal. Those years in the field taught me how to read data, why details matter, and how to break a complex problem into manageable pieces.
home.career_p2: Today I bring that same discipline to code. To me, good software isn't just a tool that works; it's a product that cares about its users, stays clean, and still stands years later. The attention I give to detail is the signature of everything I build.

stats.label: mobile apps live on the stores

home.studio_desc: My independent software studio building AI-powered mobile apps. From idea to store: design, development, and release under one roof.

about.label: About Me
about.subtitle: A journey from urban planning to real-estate appraisal, and on to software. There's a story behind every line of code.
about.closing_quote: The best code is the one that tells a story.
about.timeline_1_content: I graduated from the Department of City and Regional Planning at Gazi University's Faculty of Architecture. Those years of intensive work with planning, analysis, and design software were where I first learned to care about detail and to report with structure.
about.timeline_2_content: For nine years I worked as a field and inspection specialist in the real estate appraisal sector, advancing my career by earning the Certified Appraiser license. The analytical mindset and problem-solving habits I built in that period sit underneath every line of code I write today.
about.timeline_3_content: After deciding to change careers, I completed the Software Specialization Training at Neos Software Academy, an intensive program covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, C#, Bootstrap, React.js, and .NET. During the 7-week internship I built a car rental website from scratch, gaining my first production experience on both the front-end and the back-end.
about.timeline_4_content: As a Full-Stack Developer I build end-to-end business workflow systems for manufacturing and retail clients: B2B commerce portals with ERP (Netsis) integration automating order, inventory, and invoicing flows; payment and POS integrations with collection automation; and CRM, logistics/TMS, and production-planning modules delivered from SQL Server schema to API to UI. On the front-end I build component-driven Vue.js and React interfaces; on the back-end I design resilient REST services with rate-limiting and retry/backoff for high-volume external APIs.
about.timeline_5_content: I developed and launched GGHub, a gaming social platform, as a personal project. Built on Next.js and .NET Core, the platform has reached its V2 release with multilingual support, SignalR-based real-time messaging, and significant performance improvements. V3 work is underway with OAuth integrations and user content sharing features.
about.timeline_6_content: Under my independent mobile software studio SeptimusLab, I develop and publish AI-powered applications. Fintel for periodic expense tracking and PureScan Cosmetics for cosmetic ingredient analysis are live. PureScan Foods has launched on Google Play and its iOS version is now live on the App Store. I keep expanding my stack with React Native.

projects_page.label: Portfolio
projects_page.subtitle: From idea to release: products, experiments, and personal projects. Each one was born to solve a real problem.

rent_a_car.title: Rent A Car Full-Stack Platform
rent_a_car.description: A scalable car rental platform I built on .NET 8 and ASP.NET Core MVC. It features relational database management via Entity Framework Core, role-based access control (RBAC) with Identity, and secure CRUD operations. Developed during my Neos Software Academy internship, with a strict commitment to clean code principles.

butce_360.title: Budget360° Expense Tracker
butce_360.description: My first prototype for credit card cycle tracking and expense management. Built with Vue.js 3 and Firebase Realtime Database, it laid the experimental groundwork for what later became Fintel.

purescan.title: PureScan - Cosmetic Ingredient Analyzer
purescan.description: An AI-powered cosmetic ingredient analyzer. It reads ingredients via camera OCR, barcode scanning (OpenBeautyFacts), or manual input; offers Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite powered risk assessment, skin-type compatibility scoring, TTS audio summaries, and an AI chat assistant. The Virtual Cabinet adds analyzed products to an inventory and checks cross-product compatibility through a conflict engine. Runs on a freemium model with RevenueCat Pro subscriptions and AdMob integration, compiled to Android with Capacitor, and live on Google Play.

not_defteri.title: Interactive Notebook App
not_defteri.description: A small but delightful app offering a dynamic notebook experience. Built with HTML, CSS, and Vue.js 3.

fintel.title: Fintel - AI Financial Assistant
fintel.description: A hybrid (LocalStorage + Firestore) financial assistant that started as a rapid Gemini prototype and grew into a professionally engineered SaaS product. Its 'Nova AI' (Llama 3.3 70B on Groq infrastructure) processes PDFs and receipts with high accuracy through GLM-OCR, delivering expense analysis and personalized savings strategies. Ported to Android with Capacitor and live on Google Play.

purescan_foods.title: PureScan Foods - Food Ingredient Analyzer
purescan_foods.description: A cross-platform food label analyzer I built with React Native and Expo on Firebase infrastructure. It reads labels via barcode scanning and camera OCR, using Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite for allergen detection, additive risk analysis, and dietary compatibility assessment. Family profiles calculate a compatibility score for each member based on their allergies and preferences. Includes an E-code additive dictionary, the Guru AI chat assistant, and multi-language support; all API traffic is routed through Firebase Cloud Functions to protect user privacy. Live on Google Play and the App Store.

openworld.title: OpenWorld - Local AI Super Agent
openworld.description: A Windows-based local AI super agent with 4-layer security. It offers 100+ built-in tools for screen control, file management, OCR, research, and code management, and runs with Ollama or cloud LLMs (Groq, Z.AI). Includes remote control via a Telegram bot, semantic tool routing, and a notebook system. An experimental project under active development.

multimind.title: MultiMind - Autonomous Multi-Agent System
multimind.description: An autonomous multi-agent system that takes a single prompt and plans, codes, tests, and self-corrects until it ships working software. A central orchestrator coordinates five specialized agents (engineer, backup engineer, tester, and a vision agent that visually verifies the UI against the original prompt), each running in isolated sandboxes. It has a self-healing loop that catches failures and feeds them back for automatic recovery, plus live Telegram progress reporting.

sip.title: SIP - Sales Intelligence Platform
sip.description: A multi-tenant analytics engine for field-sales operations: it scores leads, surfaces cross-sell opportunities, and predicts customer churn, with a natural-language interface that turns business questions into SQL queries. I built it on .NET 8, React, and Python/FastAPI with CQRS and background job pipelines, running a hybrid local-plus-cloud LLM strategy. Currently in testing with a live enterprise client.

gghub.title: GGHub - Gamer Social Platform
gghub.description: My monorepo project uniting .NET 8 and Next.js 15 under Clean Architecture has reached its V2 release. Alongside game search, detailed reviews, a home feed, badges and levels, leaderboards, an admin panel, and user profile algorithms, it delivers multilingual support (EN/TR), SignalR-based real-time messaging, and significant performance improvements. The V3 roadmap includes Steam, Epic, and Google OAuth integrations plus admin-approved user content sharing.
